title: junellia spathulata var. spathulata
intro: Junellia spathulata var. spathulata, also known as the 'Coyote Brush', is a shrub-like plant native to South America, particularly in the Andean regions. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to exhibit wound healing and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Junellia spathulata var. spathulata include the treatment of various conditions such as skin ulcers, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off bacterial infections. Junellia spathulata var. spathulata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for its medicinal properties.
